name: m3
description: Local-first persistent memory for Claude Code — 66 MCP tools, hybrid search (FTS5 + vector + MMR), bitemporal contradictions, GDPR primitives, chatlog auto-capture, multi-agent handoffs.

endpoint.title: LLM endpoint
endpoint.description: OpenAI-compatible endpoint for embeddings + enrichment. Leave empty to probe LM Studio :1234 and Ollama :11434.

capture_mode.title: Chatlog capture mode
capture_mode.description: Which Claude Code hooks fire chatlog ingest. One of: both | stop | precompact | none. 'both' = Stop + PreCompact (recommended). Validated by mcp-memory at runtime; invalid values fall back to 'both'.
